title: Recent entries
subtitle: tools and libraries published in the last 30 days, across personal and org accounts

list.name: badgecollector
list.description: A public, file-backed badge and certification system — issue and verify credentials with nothing but a static host and a folder of files behind them.

list.name: cardsapi.designer
list.description: CardForge — a browser-based TCG card designer that uses a GitHub repo as its backend. Shared starter layouts ship separately as cardforge-templates.

list.name: avatars
list.description: Shared in-character avatar chat API behind the OHM ruler galleries at people.ofthepast.org. OpenAI-compatible surface, deployed on Vercel.

list.name: lcars-core
list.description: LCARS (Star Trek) UI: a themeable Stylus/CSS layer plus a small data-binding runtime. Core of a family — React (lcars-react) and Angular (lcars-ngx) wrappers ship alongside it.

list.name: coordinatore
list.description: Rule-agnostic Telegram bot that coordinates multi-table tabletop sessions. Games are plain YAML configs; one deployment runs many concurrent sessions of different games. First config: Vespri 1282.

list.name: py-regiondo
list.description: Python client for the Regiondo Booking API — the experiences-booking layer behind the E-Dway hop-on hub.

list.name: django-ninja-spatial
list.description: GeoJSON and Mapbox Vector Tile serialization for django-ninja on top of GeoDjango — spatial responses without leaving the type-checked schema layer.

list.name: maplibre-grid
list.description: Client-side square and hexagonal VTT grid generation for MapLibre GL JS — drop a tabletop grid over any fantasy map in the browser.

list.name: harris-mcp
list.description: Model Context Protocol server for reading and auditably editing Harris matrices (archaeological stratigraphy). HMDP/CSV/XLSX/HMC adapters, an LLM-tuned read surface, and a changelog-backed write surface across a whole corpus.

list.name: badger
list.description: SuperBand BLE badge library in Kotlin Multiplatform, with a Web Bluetooth demo — driving wearable event badges from native or the browser.

list.name: geocontext-app
list.description: Tauri v2 + SvelteKit editor for GeoContext repositories — the desktop companion to the geocontext-qgis exporter, editing the same gcx.json format directly.

list.name: tileserver_rust
list.description: Rust port of ohm_tileserver: a read-only OHM vector-tile API built on axum + deadpool-postgres + mvt — the tile pipe, rewritten for throughput.

list.name: geobard
list.description: Turn GeoJSON into prose: window views, custom prompts, and image-generation prompts via any OpenAI-compatible chat-completions endpoint.

list.name: inspector
list.description: Affordance extraction for embodied scenes — given an object or situation, returns a structured list of affordances suitable for agent planning. The engine behind the ofm-items Foundry module.
